title.en: In the blink of an eye, tens of thousands of ye...

content.en:
In the blink of an eye, tens of thousands of years have passed!

this day.

Ye Tian's copy body cultivated the Mixed Yuan Body in the Dark Forbidden Domain, and this time it did not collapse, and he completed the initial cultivation, but it was still very early to cultivate the Mixed Yuan Holy Body, but it was a good start.

After about dozens of days of cultivation, this body still collapsed.

But then, Ye Tian was able to persist for a long time every time, and his understanding of the Mixed Yuan Holy Body Method became deeper and deeper.

In this way, another 10,000 years have passed.

For the first time, Ye Tian completed the first step of the Mixed Yuan Holy Body and initially practiced into the Mixed Yuan Holy Body.

Once the initial cultivation of the Mixed Yuan Holy Body is achieved, it means that it will not collapse again, and the most dangerous level has passed.

Ye Tian did not continue to cultivate the Mixed Yuan Holy Body, so this was a copy body, there was no need to continue cultivating, but he lifted the copy body, re-copied the body, and re-cultivated the Mixed Yuan Holy Body.

His purpose was to completely master the process of condensing the Mixed Yuan Holy Body, and ensure that he was 100% proficient, not relying on luck.

The first time you practice, it doesn't mean that you can practice every time.

Sure enough, the second time he re-cultivated the Mixed Yuan Holy Body, Ye Tian failed to condense it, which showed that it was luck last time.

Fail!

Succeed!

Fail!

Succeed!

In this way, Ye Tian has been hovering between success and failure, but as the number of times increases, the probability of Ye Tian's success is getting higher and higher.

From a three-percent success rate at the beginning, to a seven-eighty-percent success rate at the back.

But what Ye Tian wanted was a ten-percent success rate, so he was not in a hurry to let the ontology cultivate the Mixed Yuan Holy Body.

After cultivating for 100,000 years, Ye Tiancai finally increased his success rate by 100 percent, because he had almost completely comprehended the condensation process of the Mixed Yuan Holy Body Method, and I am afraid that no one knew better than him in the condensation of the Mixed Yuan Holy Body.

this day.

Ye Tian's body left the human realm and entered the dark forbidden realm.

In the place where he had been cultivating the Mixed Yuan Holy Body, he started cultivating the Mixed Yuan Holy Body again, the only difference was that this time he was cultivating the Mixed Yuan Holy Body, and this was the first time he had truly cultivated.

Bang!!!!!

The origin power of the twelve forbidden paths descended and poured into Ye Tian's body.

The cultivation begins!

Everything went very well, after all, he had cultivated too many times, and he had almost formed an instinct, and there was no possibility of mistakes.

Not long after, Ye Tian successfully cultivated the Mixed Yuan Holy Body.

The Mixed Element Holy Body is a forbidden body physique, and it is not directly related to the degree of refinement of the forbidden body.

Originally, Ye Tian's forbidden body tempering degree was ninety percent, but now after practicing the Mixed Yuan Holy Body, the tempering degree of the forbidden body suddenly increased by thirty percent, reaching the level of ninety percent three.

And after cultivating the Mixed Yuan Holy Body, it would be much easier for Ye Tian to refine the Forbidden Body in the future, and as the Mixed Yuan Holy Body became stronger and stronger, the degree of refining the Forbidden Body naturally became faster and faster.

"With the Mixed Yuan Holy Body, I'm afraid that my forbidden body will soon be able to be refined to ten percent, and this aspect of my physical body will be the first to enter the Extreme Dao level!"

Ye Tian muttered.

Of course, this is not the real Extreme Dao, it can only be said that one-third of the Extreme Dao is far inferior to the real Extreme Dao level, but it is also very powerful, which will make Ye Tian's strength fundamentally improved.

In the following days, Ye Tian focused on the Mixed Yuan Holy Body and the Refining Forbidden Body, and countless forbidden and strange things were spent on himself.

10,000 years and 10,000 years have passed.

Ye Tian's forbidden body refining level increased from ninety-three to ninety-four, and then to ninety-five.

Although the improvement is getting slower and slower, it has been improving.

After hundreds of thousands.

Ye Tian consumed a large number of forbidden strange things and some forbidden treasures of the cultivation type, and only then did he finally refine the forbidden body to ten percent.

Ten percent of the forbidden body represents the extreme of the forbidden body, and it also means that Ye Tian and those innate forbidden creatures are already at the same level in essence, and they can be regarded as congenital forbidden creatures.

The forbidden body was tempered ten percent, and Ye Tian's mixed yuan holy body was also initiated.

It's a double blessing!

At the same time, Ye Tian's strength also skyrocketed.

In the past, he was roughly equivalent to the powerful Ten Thousand Things Realm Half-Step Domain Ancestor, but now he is equivalent to the top Ten Thousand Things Realm Half-Step Domain Ancestor, and his strength is definitely not weaker than Jinchen Dao Ancestor.

Next, as long as he elevates his soul to an immortal soul and completely transforms the forbidden Dao power into the forbidden power, it is equivalent to stepping into the extreme Dao level in all three aspects of essence, qi and spirit, which is the true extreme Dao realm.

Now, the Extreme Dao of the Flesh Body can replenish the Dao power, and he can completely transform the forbidden Dao power into the purest forbidden power faster.

The only thing that was difficult was the soul aspect, and he didn't know what to do to be able to ascend to the immortal soul level, although there was an extreme path inheritance that could be cultivated, it would also take a long time, and it would take too long, and it would almost make people desperate.

"I wonder if the Devourer has a way to increase the strength of the soul?"

Ye Tian muttered.

Because the Devouring Clan did not cultivate, but only devoured the world to cultivate, the soul must be one of the weaknesses, and he didn't believe that those top Devouring Clans would let go of this defect.

After all, it's okay if the physical body is weaker, and the physical body can be recovered from heavy injuries, but it is difficult to recover if the soul is severely damaged.

The previous invincible Dao Ancestor named Tengfeng was a very weak Devouring Clan, and he must have only been born in the last civilization era, so it is estimated that he doesn't know much.

"I'll still have to ask the Devourer called Killing Wind!"

Ye Tian decided.

Immediately, he copied Teng Feng's body and entered the Devouring Realm again.

-------------------

"Senior Killing Wind, I'm here again!"

Ye Tian came to the trading place of Killing Wind and spoke.

After Killing Feng woke up, he was a little annoyed and said, "Tengfeng, why did you come to disturb me again, how long has it been?"

Ye Tian said sorry first, and took out a full hundred World Origin Crystals, which made Killing Wind feel much better.

"Say, what's the matter, is there something to trade?"

Killing Wind asked.

"It's not a deal, it's a consultation!" Ye Tian asked seriously: "Is there any way for our Devouring Clan to increase the strength of the soul, greatly increase that?"

"What are you asking for?"

Killing Wind asked curiously.

Ye Tian opened his mouth and said: "This time I met an invincible Dao Ancestor, the other party is proficient in soul secret arts, I almost planted it in his hands, so I want to improve the strength of my soul, so as not to fall due to soul problems in the future!"

Killing Wind was silent for a while, and then said: "There is indeed a way to increase the strength of the soul, but the means of improvement are in the hands of those adults, and the ordinary Devouring Clan has no chance to obtain a way to increase the strength of the Soul, after all, there is a competitive relationship between the Devouring Clan and the Devouring Clan, and you have no background!"

"Is there really no way?"

Ye Tian was unwilling.

"There's a way!" Killing Wind suddenly thought of something and spoke.
